goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'hotel type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and attraction type
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should include free wifi
Make sure you get address and hotel type
